TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_cehuy, title = cehuy, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/cehuy} }

S.FORM: == cehuy == pkbsyaq phapuy qu cehuy qasa gi mteluq niqun ga, mutu mkgak sa qolu'. qntaqun hiya' ga, gluw na cehuy.
== cehuy == pkbsyaq phapuy qu cehuy qasa gi mteluq niqun ga, mutu mkgak sa qolu'. qntaqun hiya' ga, gluw na cehuy.
S.PHON: == ʦ~ʨeħuj == pkβs~ɕjaq pħapuj qu ʦ~ʨeħuj qas~ɕa ɣi mteluq niqun ɣa, mutu mkɣak s~ɕa qoluʔ. qntaqun ħijaʔ ɣa, ɣluw na ʦ~ʨeħuj.
